strengths: Currently Staff Engineer in full-stack role matching primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with demonstrated AI agent infrastructure expertise at re:cinq
6+ years proven full-stack development with track record of shipping at scale: millions of paper mails at Optilyz, millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD/CI/CD practices, open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts), and mentoring through workshops and coding dojos
concerns: Resume does not explicitly mention Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright—specific frameworks listed as primary stack tools
Early career pattern of short tenures (3-6 months at WatchUp, RIDE Capital) raises stability questions, though recent 3+ year tenure at Optilyz shows stabilization
No evidence of PostgreSQL or relational database experience; cloud platform expertise limited to AWS despite GCP/Azure being listed as required

key_factors.factor: Primary stack match (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS, Kubernetes)
Missing specific framework documentation (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, PostgreSQL)
Early-career instability vs. recent stabilization pattern

response.justification: Szabo is a strong technical fit with 6+ years of full-stack experience directly matching the primary stack and current Staff role featuring AI agent infrastructure—a specific requirement. His demonstrated ability to ship at scale, strong engineering culture (TDD, open-source), and CS degree align well with core qualifications. Primary concerns are missing explicit mentions of Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright (though testing framework and Node.js ecosystem experience is evident), and PostgreSQL/relational database gaps. These are learnable for someone at this seniority level with his foundation.
